title: Hydrogen Fuel Cell
description: This is really the second part of my attempt to make AZO conductive transparent film. For it I need an aluminium precursor to dope the zinc acetate with prior to calcination. I decided to use aluminium chloride and as a method of getting to aluminum chloride i decided to go via the aluminium via sodium hydroxide route as it is a fascinating reaction and has tons of possibilities for making hydrogen fuel cells. The main problem with home attempts is the discolouration caused by using kitchen foils. The easiest way to overcome this is to clean the foil in sulphuric acid prior to use. The materials used can be reclaimed and I go through some suggested processes for this. A similar reaction can be done using sodium carbonate or washing soda
